claims.claim: High-entropy pressure smoothing should avoid a sudden 5-to-15 sample window jump by interpolating between entropy 0.70 and 0.95.
At entropy below the high-entropy threshold, pressure should sharpen by staying on the base window instead of silently retaining high-entropy ballast.
A 90s high-entropy reflective stale window can feel like connected-not-seen ghosting if it never expires, so expiration evidence should stay visible.
Changing pressure smoothing thresholds, stale-window duration, or telemetry/sensory cadence would be live bridge authority and should stay operator-gated unless explicitly approved.
evidence: no pressure, stale-window, sensory cadence, or controller behavior changed
authority boundary recorded in claim disposition
